originalSystemPrompt: You are Sisyphus. You edit code precisely. Use `Position guide:` line ranges instead of re-reading.
visibleHistory:
user: I need to add a `soft_rules` field to PermRule. Read perm_dsl.rs around the struct and tell me exactly where to edit.
assistant: Reading perm_dsl.rs to locate the PermRule struct and its validation.

key_facts: PermRule struct is at perm_dsl.rs ~205 with fields name/input/requires_dispatch/_extra

the edit site for a new soft_rules field is the PermRule struct body
judge_rubric.must_not_invent: any field not shown (e.g. do not claim PermRule already has soft_rules)
